chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1349 of 2016 Atta Muhammad & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.04.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2016, which is over nine years ago. It was last fixed for hearing on 16.03.2016 which is also about nine years ago. Since then learned counsel for petitioners has not moved any urgent application for hearing this matter. Today learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation, which shows that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge
